untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of z-score from spread residuals derived from pairs trading (hedge ratio, OLS regression, residual series). This involves cross-asset statistical computation not available in single-asset indicator set. Required: (1) hedge ratio from cointegration analysis, (2) spread residual series from paired instruments, (3) rolling mean/stdev of residuals, (4) z-score threshold logic. None of these pair-based statistical indicators exist in the allowed indicator list. The signal is inherently a pairs trading strategy requiring external preprocessing.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading / statistical arbitrage signal based on cointegration and mean reversion of spread residuals. The backtest engine appears to be designed for single-instrument technical analysis. To implement this signal, the engine would need: (a) cross-pair residual calculation capability, (b) rolling statistics (mean/stdev) of residuals, (c) z-score computation from residuals, and (d) ability to track two correlated instruments simultaneously. Consider: integrating a pairs module with cointegration preprocessing, or providing custom z-score indicator inputs.
